meta.name: ex_11_18_xy
meta.note: Shigley Example 11-8, xy-plane reaction model for the helical-gear shaft. Uses the radial force plus the applied point couple generated by the helical axial force at the pitch radius. The direct axial load is intentionally omitted because the tapered-bearing thrust split is handled separately by Shigley's bearing-selection procedure. Stiffness values are chosen only to keep the beam numerically well-scaled for plotting in mm units; reactions remain governed by statics.
meta.reference: Based on Shigley Example 11-8. Radial force Fr = 1770 N downward at x = 100 mm, plus applied couple M = 169000 N*mm at the same station, on a 150 mm span. Textbook reactions in the xy plane are RyA = 1717 N and RyB = 53.3 N.
